common.brandTagline: AI-powered browser game creation and sharing
common.loadingTimeout: Loading timed out: the service is responding too slowly. Please try again later.

nav.sidebarHint: Instant wow on top, workspace and discovery below.

footer.description: {appName} - an AI and spec-driven browser game pipeline for idea validation, teaching demos, and fast iteration.

account.loginDesc: After signing in, you can sync your workspace across devices. Share links with invite codes for referral attribution. You can also create anonymously using browser cookies.
account.oauthHint: WeChat / QQ / Feishu / LINE / Douyin require app credentials in .env before they can be enabled. Use Development Login in local development.

home.wowMoment: Reach the wow moment in three steps
home.dualProductDesc: Layer 1: wow entry (Home → Create → Result). Layer 2: workspace, discovery, remix, and advanced editing.
home.strategyDesc: New users first feel that it really works. Advanced users refine, publish, and operate inside the same product.
home.ctaDesc: From one sentence to something playable, readable, and watchable - your work starts now.

pillars.wowBody: The unified creation entry recommends games, novels, or comics from your idea so you can quickly feel: this is what I wanted.
pillars.depthTitle: Hand off to the creator workspace
pillars.depthBody: If you like it, save and share it. If you want to refine it, continue in the workspace with rewrites, copies, and tuning - depth stays on the second layer.
pillars.communityBody: Browse community works and remix popular ideas so consumption becomes the starting point for the next creation.

productIa.headline: Turn one sentence into something playable, readable, and watchable
productIa.subhead: See a visible result first, then decide whether to keep polishing it. Games, novels, and comics can all start from the same idea.

steps.step1Body: No need to choose a format first. Just describe what you want to see.
steps.step2Body: The system recommends the best medium and gets you something visible as quickly as possible.
steps.step3Body: If you like it, save and share it. If not, switch direction and keep going.

modes.gameTagline: See a playable version fastest, ideal for demos and sharing
modes.novelTagline: Best for stories, chapters, children’s content, and longer serials
modes.comicTagline: Adapted from novel text with dialogue/narration and panel art, anchored by character references
modes.comicEta: About 5-40 minutes depending on panel count

starterPrompts: A hand-drawn grassland tower defense where wooden arrow towers guard a carrot cottage from small animals along a dirt road
A warm children’s short story about a little white rabbit who shares carrots in the forest
A time traveler arrives at Coal Hill in the late Ming era and must change the course of history in seven days
productIa.discoverIntakeTitle: No idea yet? Start by remixing someone else's work
productIa.discoverIntakeBody: Browse community creations, copy a setup into your workspace with one click, and turn it into your own version.

start.title: Start with your idea
start.desc: No need to pick a format first. We’ll recommend whether it should become a game, novel, or comic, then take you to the right creation page.
start.placeholder: For example: a hand-drawn grassland tower defense with arrow towers guarding a carrot cottage while little animals attack along a dirt road...

billing.title: Plans & Quota
billing.desc: Generating works costs quota for signed-in users. Invite friends and both sides receive bonus credits.
billing.devPaySuccess: Payment succeeded (dev simulation), quota has been added
billing.orderCreated: Order created: {orderId}, please complete WeChat or Alipay payment

studio.title: Creator Workspace
studio.desc: More than a library of works - it shows what you created recently, what still needs work, and what to do next.
studio.searchPlaceholder: Filter by title, description, or short-link snippet…
studio.empty: No works yet. Start from a single idea.
studio.noMatch: No matching works found. Try another keyword.
studio.coversReady: All covers and panel art are ready. Focus on publishing and sharing.
studio.launcherTail: , or remix something popular from discovery.

quota.title: Not enough generation quota
quota.defaultError: Invite friends or upgrade your plan to continue creating.
quota.neededAvailable: This action needs {needed} credits, current balance {available}

errors.globalDesc: If you just ran a long test or changed config in development mode, restart npm run dev and try again.
errors.notFoundTitle: This work could not be found
errors.notFoundDesc: The link may have expired, or the work may have been removed.

lists.novelDiscoverDesc: Read community novels, or remix them into your version
lists.comicDiscoverDesc: Browse storyboard comics and remix to start creating
lists.deleteConfirmNovel: Delete "{title}"? Related comics will also be deleted and cannot be recovered.
lists.deleteConfirmComic: Delete comic "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
lists.deleteConfirmGame: Delete game "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
lists.deleteFailedSession: Delete failed. Please use the same browser session as when you created this work.

resultBanner.satisfied: Like this result? Save it, share it, or keep refining it.

workStatus.savedPendingReview: Your work has been saved. It will appear in discovery after review.
workStatus.savedHidden: Your work has been saved as private and is visible only to you.
workStatus.savedPublished: Your work has been published and can now be discovered by others.

metadata.siteDescription: Operone: generate playable games, readable novels, and visual comics with AI, then save, refine, and share them.
metadata.siteOgDescription: An AI-powered platform for creating games, novels, and comics.

share.defaultDesc: Check out what I created with AI
share.linkCopied: Link copied. Paste it into WeChat, QQ, Feishu, etc.
share.wechatNativeHint: Tap ··· in the top-right to share with friends or Moments
share.wechatHint: Native share in WeChat; copy link elsewhere
share.qqHint: Copy link and paste in QQ
share.feishuHint: Copy link and paste in Feishu

novelResume.hint: Long-form novels can resume from the create page without starting over.

novelCreate.structureMarks: Structure: {interpret} → {body} → {closing}. To change tier, edit the brief and go back to step 1.

novelRead.loginToAdapt: Sign in to continue adapting; your local works will merge after login.

novelBrief.addonPlaceholder: e.g. third person, heavier romance, open ending…
novelBrief.childrenAddonPlaceholder: e.g. softer tone, add a question for parents…
novelBrief.narrativeModeRetelling: Classic retelling (lead tells the source tale)
novelBrief.narrativeModeListenerExtension: After-listening extension (child + friends learn the moral)

novelContinue.streamRequired: Server did not return a stream response
novelContinue.continueInterrupted: Continue stream interrupted. Keep this page open and retry.

comicPanel.consistencyBody: From the novel body and creative brief, the system locks character design → generates reference art in parallel → storyboard panels include dialogue/narration overlays (no readable text in the art) → panel art anchors to references and the first panel style. Long works generate storyboard text first, then parallel panel art on the comic page.
comicPanel.resumeCheckpoint: Will resume an unfinished storyboard draft (checkpoint saved)

transmigration.label: Transmigration
transmigration.desc: Time travel, identity swaps, rewriting fate

fantasy.label: Fantasy
fantasy.desc: Otherworld realms, progression systems, bloodlines and destiny

wuxia.label: Wuxia
wuxia.desc: Jianghu sects, honor and vendetta, martial arts manuals

historical.label: Historical
historical.desc: Dynastic politics, alternate history, legendary generals

urban.label: Urban
urban.desc: Modern city life, business wars, comeback arcs

romance.label: Romance
romance.desc: Sweetness and angst, relationships, emotional tension

scifi.label: Sci-Fi
scifi.desc: Future tech, space opera, apocalypse, AI and mecha

mystery.label: Mystery
mystery.desc: Detective work, locked rooms, layered twists

horror.label: Supernatural
horror.desc: Eerie folklore, survival horror, forbidden unknowns

infant_0_3.label: 0–3 years
infant_0_3.features: Short rhythmic lines, simple visuals, bedtime listening

kindergarten_3_6.label: 3–6 years
kindergarten_3_6.features: Playful tone, simple characters, gentle lessons

comicOptions.childrenStyleLocked: For children's short stories, the comic uses a locked modern Q-version picture-book layout (five panels, rounded thick borders).
comicOptions.childrenHint: Storyboard generation defaults to the children's story body; the creative interpretation is for reading only.

progressNovel.coverPending: Body complete — cover will generate on the reading page

apiErrors.godotWorkspaceConflict: Godot workspace conflict (parallel build?) — wait a few seconds and retry

novelLength.streamInterruptShort: Generation stream interrupted (often gateway timeout). {eta} Keep this page open and retry.

comicRead.loginToRender: Please <login>sign in</login> to continue panel art; local works merge after login.

comicCreatePage.title: Create Comic
comicCreatePage.desc: Paste a full novel or just a one-line idea. The system expands the adaptation brief first, then generates the storyboard; dialogue, narration, and images are completed step by step.
comicCreatePage.titlePlaceholder: Leave empty to extract from the first line automatically
comicCreatePage.ideaLabel: One-line idea (optional; when pasting a long text, you can specify the adaptation direction here)
comicCreatePage.ideaPlaceholder: Example: a retired hacker in a cyberpunk city investigates an AI awakening case…
comicCreatePage.contentPlaceholder:
Paste your novel, story, or any narrative text here…
Long text is supported. AI will automatically parse the plot, characters, and key scenes.
comicCreatePage.generatingDetail: Storyboard comes first. Multi-page works continue image generation on the detail page.
comicCreatePage.connectService: Connecting to the comic generation service…
comicCreatePage.briefReady: AI has expanded the comic adaptation brief. Starting storyboard generation…

japanese_clean.hint: Clean lines, expressive faces — campus, adventure, slice-of-life

chibi_cute.label: Chibi cute
chibi_cute.hint: Large head, small body — playful and great for kids or comedy

children_picture_book.label: Children's picture book
children_picture_book.hint: Modern colorful picture-book style with thick rounded lines and pastel meadows

korean_shoujo.label: Korean shoujo romance
korean_shoujo.hint: Delicate features and soft gradients — romance and sweet stories

chinese_wuxia.hint: Xianxia jianghu with flowing robes — best for historical costume stories

chinese_campus.label: Chinese campus comic
chinese_campus.hint: Domestic animation style — school uniforms and slice-of-life campus stories

createFlow.title: Create
createFlow.desc: Turn a one-line idea into a 4-step co-creation flow: clarify intent, choose a direction, generate the spec, then play and save a version. Streaming progress and three parallel variants are supported.
createFlow.shortcut: Shortcut: Ctrl / Cmd + Enter -> stream one variant
createFlow.replayLoading: Loading the last saved full prompt from your library…
createFlow.replayError: Could not load the work description from this link. It may have been deleted or belong to a different environment. Open it from Workspace and use Regenerate instead.
createFlow.replayLoaded: Loaded the description from {title} (including previously merged reference excerpts). You can usually click "Generate Playable Version" directly without selecting files again.
createFlow.promptPlaceholder: Scene + goal + obstacles or collectibles + optional visual style keywords…
createFlow.processEmpty: Once streaming starts, this panel will keep appending the prompt summary, assets, and system notes.
createFlow.processNote: Note: the plan summary contains rules and safety copy, not the model's hidden reasoning. Long backend work may stay at "Deep Generation" for a while.
createFlow.modeBound: This idea is already bound to an existing project and can overwrite-save.
createFlow.modeNew: After generation, you can save it as a new project.
createFlow.chooseDirectionFirst: Please choose a co-creation direction first.
createFlow.spriteWait: Generating dedicated game sprites (characters, enemies, backgrounds, etc.). This usually takes 2-3 minutes, then the play page will open automatically…
createFlow.ingestBusy: Parsing assets… (uploaded files take priority over clipboard images)
createFlow.previewHint: After you finish the idea and reference assets, generate it and play below. Try the full Godot online runtime first; Phaser is for instant preview.
createFlow.previewEmpty: Click "Generate Playable Version" or "3 variants" and the preview area will appear below the idea and reference assets.

examples.0: Build a cat tower beside a country path to block carrot-stealing mouse armies
examples.1: Underwater fish collect pearls while dodging octopus ink
examples.2: Watercolor hill tower defense: arrow towers guard carrot fields along a winding dirt path

sourceHints.mock: Fell back to local rule inference (see fallback reason under Generation Evidence)

received.label: Idea ready
received.defaultMsg: Prompt summary is in the log below; connecting to the cloud pipeline next…

ingest.label: Parsing reference assets
ingest.defaultMsg: Writing reference files to session and merging descriptions, then connecting to generation service…

handshake.label: Connecting to cloud
handshake.defaultMsg: Establishing session and delivering your idea to the generation service…

start.label: Cloud accepted
start.defaultMsg: Generation service received the task; entering pipeline soon…

brief.label: Deep expansion
brief.defaultMsg: Genre knowledge pack + model filling in the eight-dimension creative brief…

prep.label: Interpreting idea
prep.defaultMsg: Organizing your prompt and options into an executable plan…

running.label: Deep generation
running.defaultMsg: LLM drafting + local correction + spec validation (may take tens of seconds to minutes)…

recap.label: Final summary
recap.defaultMsg: Extracting template, title, and key values…

log.effectivePrompt: Effective prompt sent to the model (merged excerpt)
log.imageCaptions: Reference image notes (per image, from multimodal request; not full model reasoning)
log.networkErrorHint: Check your connection or try again later.
log.variantsParallelHint: Requesting 3 GameSpecs with different flavor suffixes; switch previews with Variants on the right when done.
log.variantsEmptyHint: Server returned an empty array — please retry later.

stream.ingestQueue: Parsing queued reference assets (uploads before clipboard); idea excerpt is in the log below…
stream.ingestUrl: Fetching reference link content and merging into the description…
stream.briefWritten: Idea summary is in Process on the right; connecting to the cloud pipeline next…
stream.mergedConnecting: Reference assets merged into the description; connecting to generation service…
stream.connecting: Connecting to generation service and enqueueing the task…
stream.briefReady: Eight-dimension creative brief ready; drafting playable spec…

errors.noAssets: Select at least one asset file, or enter a URL in the link field
errors.noMergeText: No mergeable text returned — check files or links
errors.invalidSpec: Current spec is invalid and cannot be saved
errors.spriteTimeout: Sprite generation timed out; project saved. Refresh the play page later.

ingest.qualityReduced: JPEG quality was reduced further automatically
ingest.storageFailed: Reference images still could not be saved to session storage; tower-defense play will skip this batch.

ref.title: Reference assets
ref.summary: PNG/WebP/GIF keep alpha; sticker assets auto-fit sprite cells; set a purpose
ref.summaryTooltip: PNG/WebP/GIF saved to session with <transparent>alpha preserved</transparent> (no white fill). In the clipboard queue, set a <purpose>purpose</purpose> per image: mark as enemy/hero/tower <sticker>sticker types</sticker> to auto <spriteGrid>center-fit square sprite cells</spriteGrid> for tower-defense marches; do not mark large map backgrounds as enemies/towers. <noMatting>Server does not AI-mat</noMatting> complex photos — supply transparent assets yourself. With "Interpret reference images" checked, the model adds practical suggestions per image.
ref.noUploadHint: You can generate without uploads — the platform will draw characters automatically
ref.searchEnhanceHint: Off by default; when on, searches similar games and injects findings into the description
ref.generateHint: Click Generate to auto-parse queued assets; URLs in the link field are fetched and merged too
ref.generateTooltipA: When you click Generate, queued files/clipboard images or a public URL in the link field (e.g. mc.163.com) are parsed and appended to the description first.
ref.generateTooltipB: Upload PDF / DOCX / TXT / MD / images, <paste>Ctrl+V / ⌘V paste screenshots</paste>, or paste a public page link. Session writes <compress>auto-resize/compress</compress> first; if storage limits are hit, quality drops or trailing images are removed automatically. Tower-defense play uses <bg>background-class</bg> assets as maps and <enemy>enemy-class</enemy> as march sprites by purpose.
ref.purposePlaceholder: e.g. background map / enemy / hero / tower skin…
ref.urlPlaceholder: https:// online doc or article link

godotExport.offlineSummary: Happy with the build? Export offline packages (Windows / project / Android)
godotExport.offlineDesc: Online play needs no download. Use the buttons below only to install on PC, edit in Godot, or build for mobile.

novelCreatePage.pageDesc: Set the title and genre -> let AI expand the brief -> write in a streamed flow -> generate the cover and publish.
novelCreatePage.waitForBrief: Please wait for AI to finish expanding the brief, or click regenerate.
novelCreatePage.coverTimeout: Cover generation timed out (about 3 minutes). Click "Redo Cover" to try again.
novelCreatePage.copyShareFailed: Failed to copy the share link
novelCreatePage.streamRequired: The server did not return a stream response

novelCreatePage.browserDraft: Found an unfinished browser draft (before the connection was interrupted)
novelCreatePage.titlePlaceholder: For example: The First Jinyiwei of Ming
novelCreatePage.selectedGenreHint: After choosing a genre, AI will expand the brief using that genre's conventions.
novelCreatePage.ageDesc: For parents: five reader tiers (0-3 / 3-6 / 6-8 / 9 / 10), 90-900 characters, with deeper interpretation by age.
novelCreatePage.lengthDesc: Short / medium / long. You can still change it before entering writing.
novelCreatePage.addonPlaceholder: For example: the protagonist should be cunning, slow-burn at first, happy ending…

novelCreatePage.briefConfirmedChildren: Brief confirmed. Reader age was already chosen in step 1, so you can generate the story now.

superAdmin.devAutoBody: You can delete any {scope} from the gallery (Manage delete on cards). Enabled by DEV_SUPER_ADMIN=1 for local dev only — disable in .env before production.
superAdmin.helpText: No preset secret. Set SUPER_ADMIN_SECRET in project .env (see .env.example), restart npm run dev, then enter the same string here to delete others' {scope}. Or set DEV_SUPER_ADMIN=1 locally to skip the key.

playGame.samplePlayHint: Sample gallery game: favorite after playing, or clone to your workspace to customize.
playGame.guestPlayHint: Guest play · Remix saves to your session library
playGame.coCreateDesc: AI patch and quick tune above persist into this project — not just a one-off play session.
playGame.coCreateOwnerHint: You own this work: refinements are logged (partial patch or full regenerate). Guests use anonymous patch.
playGame.patchPlaceholder: Describe a change in one line, e.g. raise starting gold to 200, slow zombies, green grass background…

devBanner.title: Dev tip:
devBanner.body: Current origin {current} differs from your phone's LAN URL — theme, reference sessions, and ownership won't sync. Use {canonical} on both devices.

clientErrors.useGameStudio: Use the game studio for game brief expansion
clientErrors.needMinPrompt: Enter at least 2 characters of your idea first
clientErrors.streamNotSse: Server did not return a streaming response

playStyle.towerDefense: Your description reads **tower defense**: path marching + tower placement/upgrades + wave pacing.
playStyle.shooter: Your description reads **shooter**: top-down fire loops, wave pressure, and skill windows.
playStyle.platformer: Your description reads **platformer**: jumping, layered platforms, and collection goals.
playStyle.collector: Your description reads **collector**: pick up objects in the scene while avoiding threats.
playStyle.survivor: Your description reads **survival / forgiving dodge**: heavier HP and pacing pressure.
playStyle.avoider: Your description reads **avoider**: dodge threats with limited lives or forgiveness.
playStyle.fallback: No strong keyword match — the model/auto pipeline will infer the best template (avoider / collector / survivor / platformer / towerDefense / shooter).

templateHint.towerDefense: Template hint **tower defense** — generation will prioritize TD structure and numbers.
templateHint.shooter: Template hint **shooter** — will prioritize enemy waves, fire loops, and pressure.
templateHint.platformer: Template hint **platformer** — will emphasize jump feel and level goals.
templateHint.auto: Template hint **auto** — the model picks avoider/collector/survivor/platformer/towerDefense/shooter from your line.

prep.header: ── How the system will handle your prompt (summary, not hidden chain-of-thought):
prep.searchOn: **Web search enabled** — fetch similar play/style cues first, then merge summaries into the brief.
prep.searchOff: **Web search off** this round — text plus optional reference excerpts only.
prep.enhanceOn: Running a **second enhancement pass** to thicken systems and readable numbers.
prep.enhanceOff: Enhancement pass off — single spec pass, then local repair/validation.

fantasy.cute: Cute characters / relaxed mood / cozy tone
fantasy.default: A unified world built from your current description

gameplayCore.towerDefense: Path marching, tower upgrades, elite waves, and hold-the-point pressure together.
gameplayCore.shooter: Move-dodge, auto fire, enemy formations, and short-cooldown skills in a loop.
gameplayCore.platformer: Jump feel, terrain, collect goals, and mechanic shifts drive progress.
gameplayCore.collector: Move-collect and avoid threats in parallel for steady reward feedback.
gameplayCore.survivor: Forgiveness and pressure together — survival decisions get harder over time.
gameplayCore.avoider: Short dodge rounds and clear goals — avoid random obstacle soup.

intent.strengthEnough: One sentence is enough for a first GameSpec — refine via direction picks.
intent.riskGoal: The win condition is still vague — add what the player must ultimately do.
intent.riskThreat: Threats are vague — you may get theme without pressure.
intent.riskProgression: Progression cues are thin — use direction picks to add layers.

directionBullets.commonLead: Keep title, enemies, goals, and HUD naming unified under 「{fantasy}」.
directionBullets.td0: Stress three tower roles, elite waves, and hold events.
directionBullets.shooter0: Stress formations, fire windows, and burst skills.
directionBullets.platformer0: Level beats, terrain mechanics, timed micro-goals.
directionBullets.platformer1: Forward exploration, not random single-screen jumps.
directionBullets.default0: Goals, threats, and phase shifts — not theme-only wrapping.
directionBullets.depthExtra: Thicker mid-layer decisions and phase shifts.
directionBullets.spectacleExtra1: Stronger titles, subtitles, faction naming, and climax beats.
directionBullets.spectacleExtra2: Still playable — bolder thematic packaging allowed.

balanced.title: Ship-ready
balanced.summary: Clear rules, obvious goals, easy first play.
balanced.addonLine2: Goals, fail states, and progression visible at a glance.
balanced.addonLine3: Conservative numbers for a stable v1.

depth.title: Deeper systems
depth.summary: More events, skills, phases, and mid-layer decisions.
depth.addonLine2: Boost at least two of: skills, events, elites/bosses, goal shifts.
depth.addonLine3: Not just reskin — visibly richer gameplay.

spectacle.title: Spectacle first
spectacle.summary: Strong theme, naming, and climax while staying playable.
spectacle.addonLine2: Sharper theme naming, HUD copy, and set-piece beats.
spectacle.addonLine3: Memorable world on top of a complete loop.

assets.none: No queued uploads/clipboard refs this time — text only.

stream.recapTd: **TD overview**: base HP **{baseHealth}** · start coins **{startingCoins}** · waves **{winScore}** (tweak in quick debug).
stream.recapGeneric: **Core numbers**: player speed {playerSpeed} · hazard speed {hazardSpeed} · win score {winScore}.
stream.recapSearchUsed: **Web search**: summary merged; sources may appear after completion.
stream.recapSearchFallback: **Web search**: no usable summary this round — text-only pipeline.{warning}

comicPanelProgress.geminiRequired: Comic panel art needs GEMINI_API_KEY for style consistency (first panel + cover as references; only Gemini multimodal supports this).
comicPanelProgress.geminiWeakOpenAI: GEMINI_API_KEY is not set; OpenAI will render panels one by one (weaker style consistency — configure Gemini if possible).
comicPanelProgress.startAnchoredSheets: {detail} · Character refs anchored{extraRef}; first panel sets tone, then parallel panels
comicPanelProgress.startParallel: {detail} · First panel anchors style, then up to {concurrency} parallel jobs
comicPanelProgress.batchGenerating: Generating {count} panel images in one batch (elapsed {elapsed})…
comicPanelProgress.panelGenerating: Panel {index}/{total}: elapsed {elapsed}, image generation in progress…
comicPanelProgress.comfyNoImages: ComfyUI returned no images; falling back to cloud image generation
comicPanelProgress.comfyPartial: ComfyUI succeeded on {ok}/{total} panels; cloud generation will fill the rest
comicPanelProgress.scopeNoImages: No images in the selected scope; filling missing panels…
comicPanelProgress.connectedSerial: Connected to image service: {detail}; serial generation (auto-fills missing panels)…
comicPanelProgress.noneGeneratedWithHint: No panel images generated. {hint}. Check server logs [comic-panels] / [image-gen]

ingestWarnings.imageRolesInvalid: Invalid imageRoles JSON — per-image purpose labels were ignored
ingestWarnings.zipTooManyFiles: {name}: too many files in archive — only the first 30 were parsed
ingestWarnings.refCacheFailed: {name}: reference image could not be cached on server — Godot export may miss textures
ingestWarnings.noOpenAiKey: {name}: OPENAI_API_KEY is not set — cannot interpret reference image
ingestWarnings.visionOff: {name}: vision interpretation is off — filename recorded only
ingestWarnings.unsupportedFormat: {name}: unsupported format (use pdf / docx / txt / md / image / zip)
ingestWarnings.cloudUploadUrlMissing: REFERENCE_ASSET_STORAGE=cloud but REFERENCE_ASSET_CLOUD_UPLOAD_URL is not set — references stay session-only.
ingestWarnings.cloudUploadIncomplete: REFERENCE_ASSET_CLOUD_UPLOAD_URL is set but server upload is not implemented — still session-only.

ingestMarkers.imageNumberLegend: [Ref image numbering] Below, "Image 1", "Image 2", … follow the upload order for images only (aligned with "Ref image #N"; PDF/plain text are not counted). When generating the spec, apply each image's stated purpose to title/subtitle, theme colors, and labels (player/hazard/collectible): palette and mood must match each image excerpt and purpose. For tower-defense templates, after a successful parse the browser play session in the same tab uses reference pixels as sprites (background maps → fullscreen backdrop, monsters → marching foes, hero/carrot/crystal → path goals); JSON theme/hazard/player hues and names must not default to neon/cyber unless the brief or references call for it. Browser-side tweaks (with vision captions): PNG/WebP/GIF keep alpha; sprite-like roles are auto-centered in square cells; the server does not auto-mat complex photos—use transparent PNGs or DCC tools when needed.

novelCompleteness.tooShort: Body is too short and still reads like a draft
novelCompleteness.planIncomplete: Outline plans {planned} chapters but the body only has {written}
novelCompleteness.shortTooFewChapters: Too few chapters for a short story — setup, conflict, and resolution are incomplete
novelCompleteness.mediumTooFewChapters: Too few chapters for a medium-length story — the main arc is incomplete
novelCompleteness.unfinishedEnding: Ending still teases a cliffhanger or next chapter instead of resolving
novelCompleteness.tailTooShort: Ending is too short — looks like an unfinished cut-off
novelCompleteness.longTooFewChapters: Too few chapters for a long novel — not yet in the closing phase
novelCompleteness.noEndingSignal: Ending lacks a clear wrap-up signal — the main plot may be unfinished
novelCompleteness.okComplete: Structure is complete and the story reaches a proper ending

novelConsistency.noChapterMarkers: This segment has no "=== Chapter X Title ===" markers
novelConsistency.chapterRewind: Chapter {num} must be greater than the previous max chapter {prevMax}
novelConsistency.characterAbsentInSegment: Main character "{name}" is missing in this segment (already appeared earlier)

comicConsistency.missingCaption: Panel {scene} is missing overlay text (comics need words + art, not art alone)

novelContinuation.notLongForm: AI continue is only available for long novels
novelContinuation.chaptersRemaining: {count} planned chapters remain — you can keep writing
novelContinuation.planComplete: Original chapter plan is complete — you can add new chapters
novelContinuation.resumeFromBody: Settings will be recovered from the body and prompt to continue

godotBuildHint.loadingWithRefs: Building Godot online build — attempting to write {count} reference image(s)…
godotBuildHint.refsWritten: Reference images written to Godot build: {count}{detail}{cache}
godotBuildHint.queuedButFailed: References were queued but could not be written to the Godot build (default look will be used). Re-run ingest, then retry Godot.
godotBuildHint.noRefs: This Godot build has no reference textures (default look only).
